name: Black Forest Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Skim milk or nonfat milk
4 Packages (each containing 1/2 cup servings) Red-Cal instant chocolate pudding mix
48 Fresh/thawed frozen pitted cherries -- reserve 8 for garnish
1/2 Cup Thawed frozen dairy whipped topping
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, process yogurt and milk until smooth.
2. Add pudding mix and blend on high speed, scraping down sides of the container as necessary until thick and smooth.
3. Transfer mixture to a large mixing bowl; fold in cherries.
4. Spread mixture in pie crust.
5. Cover and refrigerate until firm, at least 3 hours or overnight.
6. To serve, decoratively spoon whipped topping onto pie; top with reserved cherries.
Each serving provides: 1/4 milk, 1/2 bread, 1/2 fruit, 105 Opt. Calories Per serving: 214 Calories, 7g Fat
